history.content:
<thought>
I can see my current cell at row 07 column D (^). The goal (G) is at row 05 column F. The cell directly in front of me (row 06 column D) is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. I will turn right to face a safe floor cell (row 07 column E) to the right, avoiding lava while progressing toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
From my position (row 07, column D), moving forward faces row 06 column D which is a floor '.', so it is safe. The goal 'G' is at row 05 column B, which is left and a bit up; advancing one step keeps me moving toward that open area without hitting lava or a wall. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal `G` at row 06 column B. I am currently facing upward (the `^` is at row 07 column D). The cell directly in front of me (row 06 column D) is floor `.` so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
In the current view, the goal `G` is to my left (row 07 column B relative to me at column D). The cell directly in front of me (to the right of my position) is a wall `#`, so I cannot move forward. I should turn left to face the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal at row 05 column D. From my position (row 07 column D, marked ^), the cell directly in front is row 06 column D which is floor (.) and is on the path toward the goal. The other nearby options aren’t immediately better, so I will move forward into the safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
From the current view, the agent `^` is at row 07, column D (facing unknown). The cell directly in front might be a wall, but I can see that going left (toward column C) would hit lava `L` at row 07, column C. Going right (toward column E) would be a wall `#` at row 07, column E. Going forward could also be a wall depending on facing. To avoid lava and walls, I should turn right first to adjust my direction toward the open floor at row 06, column C or the goal area at row 06, column D (which is `G`), and then move forward if it’s safe.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal cell (G) is immediately to my left. I am currently facing toward the '.' cell in front, but I need to move left into the goal. I will turn left to face the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
From my position (row 07, column D shown as `^`), the goal `G` is at row 06, column D. The cell directly in front of me (row 06, column D) is `G`, and moving forward would be safe since it’s the goal.  
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
